translations.definition: n. 工作場所、辦公環境

examples.en: The company renovated the workplace to encourage collaboration among teams.

translations.zh-TW: 公司翻新了工作場所，以鼓勵團隊間的合作。

examples.en: Modern workplaces must comply with strict health and safety regulations.

translations.zh-TW: 現代工作場所必須遵守嚴格的健康與安全法規。

examples.en: Employees in toxic workplaces often report lower productivity and higher turnover.

translations.zh-TW: 在有害的工作場所裡，員工通常反映出較低的生產力與較高的離職率。

translations.definition: n. 方便、便利；便利的事物；方便的時候

examples.en: Online banking offers customers the convenience of managing accounts around the clock.

translations.zh-TW: 網路銀行提供客戶全天候管理帳戶的便利。

examples.en: The hotel provides modern conveniences such as free Wi-Fi and in-room espresso makers.

translations.zh-TW: 這家飯店提供免費 Wi-Fi 與房內咖啡機等現代化便利設施。

examples.en: Submit your application at your earliest convenience and the committee will review it within two weeks.

translations.zh-TW: 請儘早於您方便時提交申請，委員會將於兩週內審核。

translations.definition: adj. 符合資格的、合格的

examples.en: Only full-time employees who have completed one year of service are eligible for paid parental leave.

translations.zh-TW: 只有任職滿一年的全職員工才有資格申請有薪育嬰假。

examples.en: Candidates with bilingual skills are more eligible for overseas postings than those without.

translations.zh-TW: 具備雙語能力的候選人比不具備者更有資格派駐海外。

examples.en: Of all the applicants, the senior analyst with project management certification was the most eligible for the promotion.

translations.zh-TW: 在所有應徵者中，具備專案管理認證的資深分析師最符合升遷資格。

translations.definition: n. 刻度盤、鐘面、撥號盤  v. 撥打（電話）

examples.en: The technician adjusted the dial on the pressure gauge to the recommended level.

translations.zh-TW: 技術員把壓力錶上的刻度盤調整到建議的數值。

examples.en: She dialed the supplier's number three times before getting through to customer service.

translations.zh-TW: 她撥打了供應商的電話三次才接到客服。

examples.en: Please wait while the system is dialing the conference bridge for today's quarterly review.

translations.zh-TW: 系統正在撥打今日季度檢討會議的電話會議橋接器，請稍候。

translations.definition: n. 提交、呈遞；提交的文件或提案；屈服、順從

examples.en: The committee acknowledged receipt of your submission and will respond within ten business days.

translations.zh-TW: 委員會已確認收到您的提交文件，將於十個工作天內回覆。

examples.en: Late submissions for the grant will be reviewed only after all on-time proposals have been processed.

translations.zh-TW: 補助金的逾期遞件，僅在所有準時提案處理完畢後才會審核。

examples.en: Submitting the hardcopy submission two days early gave the auditors ample time to review the revised budget.

translations.zh-TW: 提早兩天提交紙本文件，讓稽核人員有充裕時間審閱修正後的預算。

translations.definition: n. 公告、佈告；簡報、會刊

examples.en: The HR department posted a bulletin announcing the new flexible work schedule starting next month.

translations.zh-TW: 人資部門張貼了一則公告，宣布新的彈性工時將於下月起實施。

examples.en: Morning bulletins from the meteorology bureau warned of heavy rain along the shipping route.

translations.zh-TW: 氣象局的晨間簡報警告，航線沿途將有豪大雨。

examples.en: Subscribers receive a weekly bulletin summarizing changes to the company's compliance policies.

translations.zh-TW: 訂閱者每週會收到一份會刊，彙整該公司合規政策的變動內容。

translations.definition: n. 回答問卷者、受訪者；（訴訟的）被告、被上訴人

examples.en: Each respondent in the survey rated the new product on a five-point scale.

translations.zh-TW: 調查中的每位受訪者，以五分制為新產品評分。

examples.en: More than two thousand respondents completed the online questionnaire within the first week.

translations.zh-TW: 第一週內就有超過兩千名受訪者完成了線上問卷。

examples.en: The court ordered the respondent to pay damages to all affected suppliers listed in the complaint.

translations.zh-TW: 法院判令被告賠償起訴書中所列所有受影響供應商的損害。

translations.definition: n. 加班、超時工作  adv. 加班地、超時地

examples.en: Employees who work overtime are entitled to additional compensation under the new labor policy.

translations.zh-TW: 依據新勞工政策，加班的員工有權獲得額外報酬。

examples.en: The auditors worked overtime to finish the report before the annual shareholders' meeting.

translations.zh-TW: 稽核人員加班趕工，以便在年度股東會前完成報告。

examples.en: Overtime pay for holiday work is calculated at double the regular hourly rate.

translations.zh-TW: 假日加班費以平日時薪的兩倍計算。

translations.definition: adj. 傑出的、突出的；未償付的、未解決的

examples.en: The intern received an award for her outstanding contribution to the marketing campaign.

translations.zh-TW: 該實習生因對行銷活動的傑出貢獻而獲獎。

examples.en: Of all this quarter's projects, the logistics overhaul was more outstanding in terms of cost savings.

translations.zh-TW: 在本季所有專案中，物流改造案在成本節省上更為突出。

examples.en: Please settle the outstanding balance on your account before next month's billing cycle.

translations.zh-TW: 請在下個月的結帳週期前，結清您帳戶的未償付餘額。

translations.definition: v. 略讀、瀏覽；撇去浮沫；掠過、輕擦  n. 脫脂乳

examples.en: Before the meeting, the manager skimmed the financial summary to identify key trends.

translations.zh-TW: 會議前，經理略讀了財務摘要，以掌握主要趨勢。

examples.en: The drone was skimming the treetops when the operator noticed a fault warning on the console.

translations.zh-TW: 無人機正掠過樹梢時，操作員在控制台上注意到故障警示。

examples.en: She skims the industry news every morning to stay updated on competitor moves.

translations.zh-TW: 她每天早上瀏覽業界新聞，以掌握競爭對手的動態。
